meta.loading_pattern: runtime-read (subagent reads ≤50KB JSON each invocation; NEVER inline at build time)
meta.axe_update_cadence: monthly manual bump (no automation per 5.1 binding decision #5)

rules.false_positive_governance: Pure-gray detection is deterministic; reviewer may waive if brand explicitly chooses true-gray
Counting accent usage requires viewport-bounded sampling; advisory
Verify computed background chroma > 0 before flagging
Only fires when dark mode is active; cross-check with color-scheme media
Brands legitimately using purple should mark via project CLAUDE.md role-table override
Outer-glow detection is deterministic via spread-radius threshold
Background-clip:text + transparent fill is deterministic CSS pattern
Requires capturing both enter and exit transitions; advisory if only one observed
Source grep for prefers-reduced-motion is deterministic
Requires sampling body line-height across pages
Generic font preference is taste-only; advisory
Compare h2/p computed weight, color, spacing — deterministic
Centered hero is genre convention for many sites; advisory
shadcn/Radix detection by class signature; flag advisory
Trigger validation; check error text for what/why/how
Requires triggering a real submission to observe
Requires triggering validation error and inspecting activeElement
State coverage delegated to ui-state-matrix skill
Cross-page consistency requires sampling multiple pages
Project CLAUDE.md may legitimately bind purple as brand role
Detection: emoji as chrome icons in product UI
Animated blob detection is deterministic via CSS keyframe analysis
Hero copy pattern matching; brand may legitimately use these phrases
Box-shadow spread and color are deterministic
Default shadcn detection requires class-signature inspection
Skill returned non-JSON or schema-violating output; subagent emits to needs_review[] for human review
All 3 fallback tiers (vendored / CDN / soft-fail) failed; emit to unknowns[]
Loading state observed > 30s; emit to needs_review[]; > 5s emit to needs_review only
APCA Lc below body threshold 75 / large-text 60; dual-run light + dark per 5.20
Dark-mode Lc is worse than light-mode Lc by > 10 units; dual-run requires page.emulateMedia({colorScheme:'dark'})
Off-palette color detected; cap at major even when conformance < 90% per 5.1 binding decision #4
Computed margin/padding not multiple of base spacing unit; cap at major
Computed font-size not in declared scale; cap at major
No DTCG/tailwind/theme detected; emit to unknowns[] not findings[]
Touch-only devices may legitimately omit hover
Focus state required for keyboard navigation
Loading state required for async actions
Heading order analysis must dedup against axe.heading-order
Ambiguous link text (e.g., 'click here') — dedup against axe.link-name
Visual order vs DOM tab order; LLM judgement
Color used as sole information channel; partial dedup against axe.color-contrast
Decorative SVG/icon presented as clickable; LLM judgement
axe accesskeys: each accesskey value must be unique
axe area-alt: <area> must have alt text
axe aria-allowed-attr: aria-* attributes must be valid for the element role
axe aria-allowed-role: ARIA role must be allowed on the element
axe aria-command-name: ARIA commands must have an accessible name
axe aria-dialog-name: dialog elements must have an accessible name
axe aria-hidden-body: aria-hidden=true must not be used on document body
axe aria-hidden-focus: focusable element must not be hidden via aria-hidden
axe aria-input-field-name: ARIA inputs must have accessible name
axe aria-roles: ARIA roles must be valid
axe color-contrast WCAG 2 AA — superseded by APCA in our pipeline; dedup with apca.lc-below-threshold per spec 5.6
axe focus-order-semantics — dedup against ctx.focus-order-illogical per spec 5.6
axe heading-order — dedup against ctx.heading-hierarchy-broken per spec 5.6
axe label: form fields must have labels
axe link-name — dedup against ctx.link-text-ambiguous per spec 5.6
axe region: page content must be contained by landmarks
axe tabindex: positive tabindex values discouraged
